previous_provisional_core_stack: Layer 5 ATR14 x 2.5 trailing stop + provisional time stop 12 days
updated_provisional_core_stack: Layer 1 market regime: ihsg_ema50 > ihsg_ema200 AND ihsg_ema50 > prev_ihsg_ema50
Layer 5 ATR14 x 2.5 trailing stop + provisional time stop 12 days
what_changed: Layer 1 is provisionally tightened by adding the EMA50 slope-up requirement inside the existing market regime family.
No changes were made to Layer 3, Layer 4, ATR multiplier, trailing logic, or time stop 12 days.
No backlog hypothesis was opened as part of this adoption.

reasoning: The candidate improved final holdout average return per trade from 0.0261 to 0.3054.
The candidate improved final holdout profit factor from 0.9932 to 1.1008.
The candidate improved final holdout portfolio return from -1.0417% to 13.5128%.
The candidate reduced final holdout max drawdown from 28.5468% to 18.0377%.
OOS stayed positive with average return per trade 0.1827 and profit factor 1.0482, so the OOS degradation remained acceptable for provisional adoption.
why_adopted_provisionally.provisional_only_note: The adoption remains provisional rather than final because OOS weakened materially and operational readiness has not been cleared.

reasons: OOS performance remains weaker than the previous provisional core stack even though it stays positive.
Operational readiness has not been re-cleared on the updated provisional core stack.
Retest governance has not been reopened.
Paper trading remains blocked until a later governance decision explicitly allows it.

official_next_action.note: The next step after adoption is governance synchronization and readiness review on the updated provisional core stack, without opening new hypotheses, paper trading, or retest.
